# Lodestone Warps 0.0.1

First playable server-side release for Minecraft `26.2`.

## What's New

- Turns vanilla lodestones into a global warp network.
- Registers lodestones when placed and removes them when broken.
- Opens vanilla dialogs from right-clicking a lodestone with an empty hand.
- Supports searching destinations from the dialog.
- Supports renaming the current warp and destination warps from vanilla dialogs.
- Uses custom dialog actions to avoid vanilla command confirmation prompts.
- Supports cross-dimension warps.
- Charges a configurable item cost, with dynamic distance and cross-dimension scaling.
- Resolves mod translation keys with fallbacks so vanilla clients do not need the mod installed.

## Compatibility

- Minecraft: `26.2`
- Fabric Loader: `>=0.19.3`
- Fabric API: `0.152.2+26.2`
- Java: `25+`

## Notes

This release is designed to run server-side. Vanilla clients can use the warp dialog without installing the mod.
